scripts.migrate:resolve: NO NEED, migrate should happen on a clean db and deploy on actually db will work i.e doesn't check drift  bunx --bun prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back
scripts.migrate:baseline: mkdir -p prisma/migrations/20260418000000_init && bunx --bun prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-config-datasource --script > prisma/migrations/20260418000000_init/migration.sql && bunx --bun prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260418000000_init
